title: Villager quest
description: This mod gives villagers the ability to give you a building quest, where you need to build them a building in a specific area
body:
Did you ever feel bored when building? Do you think you need a bit of guidance?
Well, this mod can help you completely rebuild your world.

With this mod, villagers will have quests for you. Mostly to build them a house or a workspace.

It is very basic. Construction and design depends on you, but villager might have few requirements. And zone where you need to build will be marked by particles at each corner.

**HOW IT WORKS:** 
- villager that has a quest avaliable will have an exclamation mark above its head. 
- To access it you have to Right Click that villager and quest GUI will show up with quest information. 
- When you accept it, just look around for custom markings, the area where you are suppose to build.
- Structure must be fully enclosed, any gaps in walls, floor or roof will fail the quest.
- Bed or workspace block must be inside the building in order to check for enclosed structure. 
- Once done, just return to the villager, Right click and turn in the quest.

_*Mod is still in early testing phase and development, so any errors or ideas or improvements are welcome._
Any ideas or problems you can share with me in Discord, either join my group ([discord link](https://discord.gg/GZSKJpkB)) or add me (klempo19#4076)

Thank you
